graph.adapter.input_nan: Input "{{path}}" resolved to NaN: improve numeric stability
fbloop.fail_exhausted: Agent failed to generate structured result.
tools.ask_opts: Ask the user a question with choice options. Returns user's answer. You should always call this for more user input.
tools.arg_opts: The available options, can be empty
tools.sql.list_tables: List all tables in the database with row counts. Use this to discover what data is available.
tools.sql.describe_table: Describe the schema (columns, types, keys) of a specific table. Use this before querying to understand available fields.
tools.sql.query_sql: Execute a SQL SELECT query on the database. Results are returned as a markdown table. Only SELECT queries are allowed.
